detail.description:
Welcome to Toca Boca World, the ultimate universe for kids to play, design, and explore their endless imagination! This isn't just a game; it's a safe space where every story is yours to create, and the fun never stops.

Toca Boca World is where your creativity takes center stage:
🛝 Unleash your inner storyteller: Roleplay in a universe you've created, where you can tell your own stories. Become a teacher, a vet, or even an influencer.
🏡 Design your dream world: Bring your best friends to life
detail.recentChanges: It's brutal out here! Soundtrack your stories with four hit songs from olivia rodrigo in the Music Player until June 9! And look, we're getting ready for a party in the Post Office! We're dropping a rainbow dress, cake and macramé decoration to celebrate Pride! Looking for the perfect outfit for Festa Junina? We've got that covered, too! Next time, let emotions take center stage in your stories, with music from SIENNA SPIRO in the Music Player from June 9 through June 29!
